name: Braine Verify
description: Anti-hallucination gate: verifies hard numeric facts (INN/sums/dates/prices/codes) in outbound messages against the braine ask_1c reference for the same turn. Ungrounded facts are replaced with braine's grounded answer or cancelled. Code-level, not prompt.

toolName.label: Tool name
toolName.help: MCP tool that returns grounded braine facts (default: ask_1c)

minDigits.label: Min digits to verify
minDigits.help: Verify numeric tokens with at least this many digits (default 4; set 3 for stricter price checks)

highRiskDigits.label: High-risk digit length
highRiskDigits.help: Ungrounded numbers this long with no braine lookup are cancelled (default 7: INN/account/phone)
